summary: Current-state reconciliation pivoted away from surface-only W-route exposure. The source now proves canonical MetrizableLCA Quillen inflation composition using an explicit cokernel quotient witness and canonical deflation composition using the explicit equalizer kernel of p ≫ q. This is real exact-category progress, but not product completion because class-level composition-stability integration and the downstream Yoneda Ext and bounded derived infinity-category obligations remain open.
known_gaps: Positive Lean witness is absent: no OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess surface with field-level evidence for the original four-task contract exists.

QuillenExactCategory.Basic currently exposes iso transport, split conflations, pushout preservation of inflations, and pullback preservation of deflations, but does not yet expose class-level composition-stability fields.
The canonical MetrizableLCA source now proves composition stability for inflations and deflations, but these constructors are not yet lifted into product-facing class-level API.
remaining_work: Lift both composition constructors into QuillenExactCategory.Basic as product-facing composition-stability fields or theorems once both sides are honest.
Only after the exact-category axioms are honest and complete, continue the Yoneda Ext and bounded derived infinity-category positive witness integration.
